summary: The diff implements most of the required features, but has a critical deviation in REQ-113: the audio source path is wrong. The spec requires '/assets/music/background.mp3' but the implementation uses '/assets/Kadhaippoma Oh My Kadavule 128 Kbps.mp3'. Additionally, REQ-115 requires creating the directory frontend/public/assets/music/ with a README.md, but no such files appear in the diff (no added files are listed). REQ-114 is largely satisfied in AppShell.tsx.

missing_requirements.reason: The implementation uses '/assets/Kadhaippoma Oh My Kadavule 128 Kbps.mp3' instead of the required '/assets/music/background.mp3'

missing_requirements.requirement: Create directory frontend/public/assets/music/ and add a README.md explaining where to place background.mp3
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files. The directory frontend/public/assets/music/ and its README.md are not present in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Audio source points to a specific named MP3 file '/assets/Kadhaippoma Oh My Kadavule 128 Kbps.mp3' rather than the generic placeholder path '/assets/music/background.mp3'
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec explicitly requires the audio src to be '/assets/music/background.mp3'. Using a different, specific song filename was not requested and violates the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: The musicGlow CSS animation pulses between two non-transparent box-shadow values rather than pulsing from rgba(244,114,182,0.6) to transparent as specified
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec requires box-shadow pulsing from rgba(244,114,182,0.6) to transparent. The implementation uses a different animation range that never reaches transparent.
